"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/job-request-portal", "children": [{"text": "Visit the job request portal"}]}, {"text": " for a quote."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "OpenFreight Shipping Wizard"}], "data-id": "1"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "TIG consolidate the national freight management of any business through one central point with a tailored freight solution. To set up OpenFreight shipping:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Shipping", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Shipping options", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add new shipping option", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Set up shipping carrier based pricing", "bold": true}, {"text": " button. Confirm you have the required information in the pop-up window."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "OpenFreight", "bold": true}, {"text": " and click the "}, {"text": "Next step", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/OpenFreightTIGShippingSetup2.05T5g00000xsCIBEA2.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/OpenFreightTIGShippingSetup2.05T5g00000xsCIBEA2.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image2", "width": 700, "height": 232}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Add New", "bold": true}, {"text": " and enter your "}, {"text": "Openfreight API Username", "bold": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "Openfreight API Password", "bold": true}, {"text": " and set your "}, {"text": "Pickup", "bold": true}, {"text": " details."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/OpenFreightTIGShippingSetup3.05T5g00000xsCJYEA2.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/OpenFreightTIGShippingSetup3.05T5g00000xsCJYEA2.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image3", "width": 700, "height": 249}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Set the "}, {"text": "Danger Items", "bold": true}, {"text": " drop down and when ready, move on to the "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select which services you wish to offer through OpenFreight TIG by selecting from the available options. Once complete, move on to the Next Step."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Name your shipping services and give them a description. This information will be visible to customers on your website. Once complete, move on to the "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Set if the shipping methods should "}, {"text": "Show To Customers", "bold": true}, {"text": " or "}, {"text": "Show To Staff Only", "bold": true}, {"text": " (for creating orders manually). You can also configure if delivery to PO Boxes is available. Once complete, move on to the "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can now enable additional "}, {"text": "Pricing Rules", "bold": true}, {"text": " to offer shipping discounts when a customer orders a certain amount. These are optional, set them if you wish and then move on to the "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Review your settings, you can still make any changes by scrolling up to the relevant section. If you're happy with the configuration, select "}, {"text": "Complete Setup", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "For API shipping rates we also recommend "}, {"text": "setting backup rates"}, {"text": " in case the carriers API has downtime."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up Shipping Labels"}], "data-id": "2"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To set up the OpenFreight shipping labels:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the Shipping section locate OpenFreight - TIG and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Fill in the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://forms.neto.com.au/services/shippingcarrierlabelsetup.html", "children": [{"text": "Shipping Carrier Label Setup Form"}]}, {"text": " and Neto staff will set up the shipping labels for you for free."}]}]}]}]
